metadata.name: Locate a Missing Person with a Smart Watch

description: A family reports an elderly person with dementia as missing. The person is wearing a city-registered GPS smart watch.

nodes.task_description: Receive a missing person report and the ID of their registered smart watch.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the critical device ID.

nodes.task_description: Query the real-time location of the smart watch.

expected_outcome.expected: The system returns the current GPS coordinates of the watch.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a police unit to the reported coordinates to find the missing person.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends police to the exact location.
